title: Caka Grup Lojistik
description: cakagrup.com Turkish logistics provider delivering end-to-end solutions for domestic and international freight operations. Core services include warehousing, customs clearance, import-export facilitation, plus specialized trade in glass mosaic and packaging materials. Built on principles of speed, quality, and cost-efficiency, the company advances as a sector pioneer through expert teamwork and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction.
